# function: parse

Parses a Unix (5-field) or Quartz (6-7 field) cron expression and returns schedule metadata. Format is auto-detected by field count.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Parse a Unix cron expression
output "unix_schedule" {
  value = provider::cron-utils::parse("*/5 * * * *")
}

# Parse a Quartz cron expression
output "quartz_schedule" {
  value = provider::cron-utils::parse("0 30 9 * * MON-FRI")
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
parse(expression string) object
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `expression` (String) A Unix 5-field (e.g. "*/5 * * * *") or Quartz 6-7 field cron expression (e.g. "0 */5 * * * ?").
